title: Dead Lettering, Poison Messages, and Parking · Mastery Check
summary: A release board compares near-miss Go and RabbitMQ decisions for dead lettering, poison messages, and parking and accepts only bounded ownership, causal evidence, and an explicit live-broker transfer gate. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a Go poison-message remediation workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace nack or reject without requeue, expiry, length overflow, and quorum delivery-limit dead lettering through exchange and routing policy; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Configure dead lettering through mutable policy where possible and verify source read, target write, exchange existence, binding, and route permissions; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Detect and bound dead-letter cycles using history, stable identity, attempt policy, route analysis, and a terminal parking destination; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Dead Letter Trigger Route · changed case · Quiz Dead Letter Trigger Route
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Go messaging team handles case 6887 during outbox relay recovery after a database commit. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound dead-letter history, stop cycles, and separate retry tiers from authorized parking; reject stale connection and channel generations; then exhaust retry age before attempts reach their maximum. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Trace nack or reject without requeue, expiry, length overflow, and quorum delivery-limit dead lettering through exchange and routing policy; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Write the quiz evidence note for Parking Remediation Workflow: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz Go messaging team handles case 9220 during Go publisher supervisor losing one state notification. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound dead-letter history, stop cycles, and separate retry tiers from authorized parking; prove cleanup under a single deadline and cancellation cause; then remove the parking binding and expose the remediation gap. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
